---
title: "Dinah Maria Craik"
---

## Dinah Maria Craik

**Dates:** (1826-1887)

**Maiden name:** (Mulock)

### Description

novelist

### Biography

She married (29 April 1865) George Lillie Craik (1837-1905), who was a partner in Macmillan, CMY’s publishers. She had shared lodgings with Frances Martin in 1850 when both were in their early twenties.[ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 8th 1893
- Letter from May 28th [1886]
- Letter from Jany 1st 1868
- Letter from May 10 1867     
- Letter from Jan. 19. 1867
- Letter from Jany 17th [1867]
- Letter from July 7 1866
- Letter from April 19th 1866
- Letter from Aug 1. 1865
- Letter from March 6th [1864]
- Letter from Jany 10th1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
